title: KeyValue
description: A key-value pair stored in the etcd cluster. Keys and values are base64-encoded byte strings. The version field is the version of the key, the create_revision is the cluster revision when the key was created, and the mod_revision is the cluster revision when the key was last modified.

create_revision.description: Revision of the etcd cluster when the key was created

mod_revision.description: Revision of the etcd cluster when the key was last modified

version.description: Version of the key, monotonically increasing for each put on the key

lease.description: Lease ID attached to the key, or 0 if no lease is attached
